changes.description: Backend module: loads all 15 SQO artifact types, section-specific loading, critical artifact detection.
Backend module: orchestrates artifact loading and resolves 10 cockpit states with handoff readiness.
Backend module: fail-visible degradation with 7 states, section availability, replay status.
Backend module: route validation, section paths, navigation builder for 7 cockpit sections.
Backend module: 8 deterministic formatters for cockpit sections with classification lookups.
React component: cockpit navigation sidebar with degradation indicators and governance footer.
React component: explicit degradation display with state-specific messages.
React component: qualification overview with S-state, maturity, gravity, stability, progression, debt.
React component: debt items grouped by category/severity with remediation pathways.
React component: continuity metrics, coverage/fidelity/lineage bars, and continuity gaps.
React component: 8-dimension maturity profile with gravity and stability composites.
React component: S-state progression with readiness bar, missing artifacts, blocking debts by pathway.
React component: replay verifications and certifications with per-check pass/fail indicators.
React component: PATH B handoff READY/BLOCKED status, blocking conditions, package summary.
Page: client/run selector listing all registered pairs from manifest.
Page: run selector for a specific client.
Page: qualification overview (default cockpit view).
Page: semantic debt exploration.
Page: continuity assessment view.
Page: maturity profile view.
Page: progression readiness view.
Page: evidence and replay verification view.
Page: PATH B handoff readiness view.
Test file: 37 tests across 6 suites covering loader, state, degradation, routing, formatting, governance.
Added test:sqo-cockpit script and included cockpit tests in main test suite.
Documentation: artifact loader specification with 15 keys and section mapping.
Documentation: state resolver specification with 10 cockpit states.
Documentation: degradation handler specification with 7 degradation states.
Documentation: route resolver specification with 7 sections.
Documentation: formatter specification with 8 formatters and classification labels.
Documentation: 9 React component specifications.
Documentation: 9 page specifications with route structure.
